summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Profile Onboarding Flow refinements. All 13 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms all requested features working: phone number field with country code dropdown (26 options), auto-detected country code based on IP, skippable LinkedIn step ('Skip for now' button), skippable Profile Picture step ('Do it later' button), and college autocomplete with 'Mesa School of Business' and 'Masters' Union' in results.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfileOnboarding.jsx correctly implements phone number field with country code dropdown in Step 1
COUNTRY_CODES array contains 26 international codes including +91, +1, +44, +971, +65, etc.
IP-based country code detection using ipapi.co API works correctly (auto-detects based on location)
LinkedIn step (Step 7) has 'Skip for now' button with data-testid='skip-linkedin-btn'
Profile Picture step (Step 8) has 'Do it later' button with data-testid='skip-picture-btn'
colleges.js includes 'Mesa School of Business' and 'Masters' Union' at lines 9-10
Backend profile.py correctly handles phone_number and phone_country_code fields (lines 23-24)
LinkedIn URL validation in backend rejects invalid URLs and allows empty strings
seed_data_creation: Test user profile updated with phone number, UG college, target firms, and onboarding_completed=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile onboarding flow fully tested and working. Test user 'testdash@gradnext.co' has completed onboarding. To re-test onboarding, reset onboarding_completed to false via API: PUT /api/profile/update with {"onboarding_completed": false}. Welcome tour modal appears after onboarding - dismiss with X button or Escape key.

PUT /api/profile/update.details: Accepts phone_number, phone_country_code, ug_college, pg_college, linkedin_url, target_firms, prep_objective, preparation_level, onboarding_completed

GET /api/profile/me.details: Returns all profile fields including phone_number and phone_country_code

LinkedIn URL validation.details: Accepts valid LinkedIn URLs, rejects invalid URLs with 400 status, allows empty strings

elements_verified: Phone Number (optional) label with Phone icon
Auto-detected country code based on IP location
Helper text: 'Country code auto-detected based on your location'
'Mesa School of Business' appears in suggestions when typing 'Mesa'
'Masters' Union' appears in suggestions when typing 'Masters'
LinkedIn URL validation with error message for invalid URLs
Green checkmark for valid LinkedIn URLs
Upload area with 'Click to upload' text
Optional text: 'Help your peers recognize you (optional)'

interactions_tested.phone_number_input: PASS - Accepts digits only, country code dropdown works
interactions_tested.college_autocomplete_mesa: PASS - 'Mesa School of Business' found and selectable
interactions_tested.skip_linkedin: PASS - 'Skip for now' button advances to Step 8
interactions_tested.skip_picture: PASS - 'Do it later' button completes onboarding
interactions_tested.complete_onboarding_flow: PASS - Full flow completes with skipped LinkedIn and Picture

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB data from test_database. IP detection uses ipapi.co external API.
